D2 Vision L3 Apply Reference

On/Off-Center Receptive Fields

slide the centre and surround widths and watch a ganglion cell's excitatory core and inhibitory ring take shape

A ganglion cell pools an excitatory centre against an inhibitory surround, so it fires for contrast rather than for the overall light level.

Slide the centre and surround widths and watch the field's profile reshape. Toggle on-centre versus off-centre to flip excitation and inhibition, and read the cross-section beside the 2-D field.
